creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Walter Schwarzenfeld from comment #11)

I finally got back to this.

I used the patch and built on each of:

amd64, powerpc64, aarch64, 32-bit powerpc, armv7

and none of them got any complaints from the
compilers. It covers LP64, IPL32, little endian,
and big endian. All were at head -r358510 for
FreeBSD.

Looking at it, it looks reasonable to me.
Running them seemed to wrk fine as well.

I'd say to go ahead and update.
